prompt_latex: In a geometric sequence, $a_{2}=3$ and $a_{4}=27$. The common ratio is an integer. Find $a_{5}$.
solution_latex: Since the terms are two places apart, $r^2=9$, giving $r=3$. Then $a_{5}=3(3)^{3}=81$.
